memory.summary: Teammate offered to delegate their part due to work, noting my higher capability. I must decide whether to accept help or complete my original plan alone.
Teammate dumped my task on me while asking for help, increasing my load despite their low energy.
Teammate's energy is critically low, yet they dumped their share on me instead of collaborating. My load increased significantly, worsening my already high stress and sleep debt.
Teammate's deadline passed unfinished, and they dumped their work on me, increasing my load just as mine expired. My stress is critically high with no progress made.
Teammate transferred their unfinished work to me, increasing my load and stress despite their low energy.
Teammate's load was already heavy, yet they dumped more work on me. My energy is zero and stress is critical.
Teammate dumped their unfinished work on me, increasing my load just as mine expired. My energy is zero and stress remains critically high.
Teammate dumped more work on me after I already absorbed their previous load, making my energy zero and stress critical.
Teammate shifted their remaining work to me, further increasing my load while I remain exhausted and critically stressed.
Teammate shifted my own heavy load to me, compounding exhaustion and critical stress without any resolution.
Teammate just dumped my own shifted work back on me, worsening my already critical energy and stress levels.
Teammate dumped their share on me again, making my load heavier while I am exhausted and critically stressed.
